_comment: Copy this file, fill in real paths, and set DCS_AGENT_CONFIG to point at it.
_comment_nssm_path: Set nssm_path to the full path of nssm.exe if it is not on PATH.
_comment_api: REST API settings — agent listens on host:port, protected by X-API-Key header.

instances.name: Server 1
instances.exe_path: C:\Program Files\Eagle Dynamics\DCS World OpenBeta Server\bin\DCS_server.exe
instances._comment_saved_games_key: Matches the folder name under %USERPROFILE%\Saved Games\

ports._comment: Document your port assignments here for reference — not enforced by the agent.
